game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Dune: Imperium** Dune: Imperium is a turn-based digital board game combining deck-building and worker placement mechanics, played over a series of rounds until a player reaches 10 Victory Points. Each round, players draw 5 cards from their personal deck and then take turns playing cards to deploy their 2 agents to specific locations on the Arrakis board, gaining resources like Spice or Solari, drawing new cards, or advancing on faction influence tracks. After all agents are placed, players reveal remaining cards in hand to gain additional combat strength or other "reveal" effects, then resolve a combat phase where military strength from cards and agents determines control over key territories, awarding Victory Points and bonus resources. Players acquire new, more powerful cards to add to their deck through a market row, continuously refining their strategy to gain influence with 4 factions (Emperor, Bene Gesserit, Spacing Guild, Fremen) and secure the 10 Victory Points required for immediate victory.
game_info.description: Dune: Imperium is a strategic deck-building game where you compete to reach 10 Victory Points first. Deploy agents to key locations on Arrakis to gather Spice and Solari, recruit powerful allies, and gain influence with the four great factions. Each round, play cards to place your agents, then engage in combat to control territories. Build your deck with stronger cards, balance your resources, and outmaneuver your opponent to claim victory in the desert planet!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select cards/locations
Space: Confirm selection/action
Z: Cancel current selection
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to title screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including card selection, agent placement, resource collection, and faction influence tracking. Validates that the game state properly updates with each action.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly select available cards and deploy agents to valid locations. Test collecting different resources and ensure the game progresses through all phases correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game should run without errors through multiple rounds. Resources should accumulate correctly, and game phases should transition smoothly. No crashes or invalid state transitions.

TEST_1.expected: Game should run without errors through multiple rounds. Resources should accumulate correctly, and game phases should transition smoothly. No crashes or invalid state transitions.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by prioritizing Victory Point acquisition and efficient resource management. Validates that the win condition (10 VP) triggers correctly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focus on high-value combat locations, acquire powerful cards from the market, balance Spice and Solari collection to buy strong cards, and maximize faction influence for bonus VP. Deploy agents strategically to control combat zones.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Should reach 10 Victory Points and trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state within a reasonable number of rounds (typically 8-12). Win condition should be detected immediately upon reaching 10 VP.
